violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Food items uncovered in Freezer and Coolers

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Kitchen Sanitizer under acceptable Chlorine levels at time of inspection
General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Duct tape used on walls
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Plates stored facing up

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling, light fixture, and air vent require cleaning in kitchen area.
Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location -In-use fly tape in dish wash area.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
